info.title: Redesign Auth.css with two-column split and new auth UI elements

parts.text:
Redesign Auth.css completely. Keep all existing class names unchanged.
Implement a two-column split-screen layout for .auth-container.

=== LEFT COLUMN (.auth-left) — add this new element in Login.tsx and Register.tsx ===
- Width: 40%, min-height: 100vh
- Background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0a6b6b, #0e9090, #1aadad)
- Subtle diagonal line texture: repeating-linear-gradient at 45deg, 
  rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px, background-size 28px 28px
- White bold headline: "Start Creating Impact Right Away", font-size 2rem, 
  font-weight 800, line-height 1.2
- Small grey-white subtext below, font-size 0.85rem, opacity 0.65
- A floating white card (.mock-card) in lower half: background white, 
  border-radius 16px, padding 1rem, box-shadow 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.25), 
  transform rotate(-3deg), contains a placeholder dashboard image or grey blocks
- 4-5 floating pill badges scattered: white background, border-radius 999px, 
  padding 0.3rem 0.8rem, font-size 0.72rem, font-weight 600, box-shadow small, 
  absolute positioned around the mock card — labels: "Slack", "Google Ads", 
  "Zendesk", "Shopify"
- Copyright line at bottom: "© 2025. All Rights Reserved", 
  font-size 0.72rem, opacity 0.4, color white

=== RIGHT COLUMN (.auth-right) ===
- Width: 60%, background: #f4f6f8
- Display flex, center content both axes

=== AUTH CARD (.auth-card) ===
- Background: #ffffff
- Border: 1px solid #e5e7eb
- Border-radius: 20px
- Padding: 2.5rem 2.25rem
- Max-width: 400px, width: 100%
- Box-shadow: 0 4px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.07)
- NO dark background, NO gradients on the card itself

=== LOGO (.auth-logo) — new element ===
- Small circle, 48px, centered, margin-bottom 1rem
- Background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0e9090, #38b8d0)
- Display flex, align/justify center
- Contains initials "AR" in white, font-weight 700, font-size 0.85rem

=== HEADING (.auth-card h2) ===
- Font: 'Plus Jakarta Sans' or 'DM Sans' from Google Fonts (add @import)
- Font-size: 1.4rem, font-weight: 700, text-align: center
- Color: #111 — but wrap the app name word in a <span class="accent"> 
  with color: #0e9090
- Margin-bottom: 0.4rem

=== SUBTEXT (.auth-subtitle) — new element ===
- Font-size: 0.82rem, color: #9ca3af, text-align: center
- Margin-bottom: 1.6rem

=== FORM LABELS (.form-group label) ===
- Font-size: 0.8rem, font-weight: 600, color: #374151
- Letter-spacing: normal (remove uppercase/monospace)
- Margin-bottom: 0.4rem

=== INPUTS (.form-group input) ===
- Background: #ffffff
- Border: 1px solid #d1d5db
- Border-radius: 10px
- Padding: 0.72rem 1rem
- Font-size: 0.92rem, color: #111
- Placeholder color: #9ca3af
- Focus: border-color #0e9090, box-shadow 0 0 0 3px rgba(14,144,144,0.12), 
  outline none

=== PRIMARY BUTTON (form > button[type=submit], .auth-card > form > button) ===
- Background: #111111
- Color: #ffffff
- Border: none
- Border-radius: 999px
- Padding: 0.82rem 1rem
- Font-size: 0.9rem, font-weight: 600
- Width: 100%
- Margin-top: 0.5rem
- Cursor: pointer
- Transition: background 0.2s
- Hover: background #333333
- Disabled: opacity 0.4

=== SOCIAL BUTTONS ROW (.social-row) — new element ===
- Display: flex, gap: 0.6rem, margin-top: 0.75rem
- Each button (.social-btn): flex 1, background white, border 1px solid #e5e7eb,
  border-radius: 10px, padding: 0.6rem, font-size: 0.82rem, font-weight: 500,
  color: #374151, display flex, align-items center, justify-content center, 
  gap 0.4rem, cursor pointer
- Hover: background #f9fafb, border-color #d1d5db
- Add Google and Github SVG icons inline (16px)
NOTE: Add .social-row div and two .social-btn buttons inside Login.tsx 
and Register.tsx just below the submit button

=== SWITCH LINK (.switch-auth) ===
- Font-size: 0.84rem, color: #6b7280, text-align: center, margin-top: 1.2rem
- The clickable button: color #0e9090, font-weight: 700, background none, 
  border none, cursor pointer, no underline by default, hover: underline

=== ERROR / SUCCESS MESSAGES ===
- .error-message: background #fef2f2, border 1px solid #fecaca, 
  color #b91c1c, border-radius 10px, padding 0.65rem 0.9rem, font-size 0.82rem
- .success-message: background #f0fdf4, border 1px solid #bbf7d0, 
  color #15803d, border-radius 10px, padding 0.65rem 0.9rem, font-size 0.82rem

=== RESPONSIVE ===
- Below 768px: .auth-container flex-direction column
- .auth-left: display none on mobile
- .auth-right: width 100%, min-height 100vh, background #f4f6f8
- .auth-card: margin 1.5rem, padding 1.8rem 1.4rem

=== IMPORTANT RULES ===
- Do NOT change any TypeScript logic in Login.tsx or Register.tsx
- Only add the new wrapper divs (.auth-left, .auth-right, .auth-logo, 
  .auth-subtitle, .social-row) to the JSX — no logic changes
- All existing class names must still work
- Add Google Fonts import at top of Auth.css:
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');
  Apply font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif to body or .auth-container

The user wants me to redesign Auth.css completely while keeping existing class names unchanged. They also want me to add new elements to Login.tsx and Register.tsx. Let me first explore the codebase to understand the current structure.

I need to:
1. Find and read the current Auth.css file
2. Find and read Login.tsx and Register.tsx
3. Understand the existing class names and structure
4. Implement the redesign as specified

Let me start by finding these files.

parts.text:
All done. The redesign is complete:

1. Auth.css - Completely rewritten with:
   - Two-column split-screen layout (40% left, 60% right)
   - Left column with teal gradient background, diagonal texture, headline, subtext, floating mock card with badges, and copyright
   - Right column with light grey background
   - Auth card with white background, new styling
   - New .auth-logo element with "AR" initials
   - New .auth-subtitle element
   - Updated form labels and inputs
   - Updated primary button styling
   - New .social-row with Google and GitHub buttons
   - Updated .switch-auth styling
   - Updated error/success messages
   - Responsive styles for mobile

2. Login.tsx - Added:
   - .auth-left wrapper with all elements (headline, subtext, mock card, floating badges, copyright)
   - .auth-right wrapper
   - .auth-logo element
   - Updated h2 with accent span
   - .auth-subtitle element
   - .social-row with social buttons
   - Kept all existing class names unchanged

3. Register.tsx - Same updates as Login.tsx

Done. I've completely redesigned the auth pages:

**Auth.css** - New two-column layout with:
- Left column (40%): Teal gradient, diagonal texture, headline, floating mock card with badges, copyright
- Right column (60%): Light grey background centered content
- Auth card: White background, DM Sans font, accent color #0e9090auth-logo`
- New `. initials
- New with "AR" `.auth-subtitle` for description text
- New `.social-row` with Google/GitHub buttons
- Updated form inputs with focus states
- Updated button: black rounded, hover effect
- Updated error/success messages with colored backgrounds
- Responsive: hides left column on mobile

**Login.tsx & Register.tsx** - Added wrapper elements:
- `.auth-left` with headline, subtext, mock card, badges, copyright
- `.auth-right` wrapping the auth card
- `.auth-logo` with "AR" initials
- `<span className="accent">` around app name
- `.auth-subtitle` element
- `.social-row` with Google and GitHub buttons
